programme.title: The Fine Art Auction - Live!
programme.desc: Bid on works from the masters to modern contemporary art, all at unbelievable auction prices!

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Rare Limited Silver
programme.desc: Secure the lowest mintage Philadelphia Proof Silver Eagle ever issued by the US Mint with this 2026 Congratulations Set Silver Eagle graded PF70UCAM. This coin boasts a minscule 60,000 mintage limit, housed in a signed First Day of Issue holder.

programme.title: 2026 Silver Eagle is here & it is a once-in-a-lifetime coin!
programme.desc: Join your hosts Kevin Cash & Cory Cady as we discuss the 250th Anniversary of America with the official "America 250" logo on a Silver American Eagle label; we are locking in orders for this iconic release, but coins are limited! Don't miss out!

programme.title: Historic Silver Set
programme.desc: Add the stunning Set of 25 1878 San Francisco to 1921 Philadelphia Morgan Silver Dollars graded in Mint State 63 condition to your collection. Out of all Morgan Silver Dollars produced by the US Mint, only 1.7% have survived in Mint State condition!

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: 1776 USA Pure Gold
programme.desc: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of American Freedom with this Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM. Encapsulated in a 1 of 250 40th Anniversary holder with the First Day of Issue designation, this is a once in a lifetime American coin!

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: 1776 USA Pure Gold
programme.desc: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of American Freedom with this Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM. Encapsulated in a 1 of 250 40th Anniversary holder with the First Day of Issue designation, this is a once in a lifetime American coin!

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A vest with a twist that was inspired by a girl's science project; baking healthy, homemade cookies; a cleaning solution for water bottles; re-usable fabric stickers.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The man who created Rollerblades seeks an investment for his latest invention; a businesswoman from Rochester, N.Y., wants to make a deal for an accessory that turns any shoe into a boot.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A line of "manscaping" products; a new way to get refreshed; a sweet treat that complies with the keto diet; an immigrant from Vietnam pitches his buttery-soft dress shirts, bringing along an unlikely celebrity partner.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: An Italian cuisine business; a fashion line that provides a functional solution to a common problem for babies; a humane pest control solution; a former beauty queen turns one of the biggest issues in farming into a business opportunity.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A plant-based natural hair care line intentionally crafted for multicultural young men; a solution to help pet parents keep their dogs calm during loud events; a healthy snack made from an ancient superfood; a former athlete combines art and play.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A non-toxic product that helps dispose of cooking oils safely; a tool that transforms eating utensils into a common kitchen accessory; a viral device designed to help save time and lessen fatigue; a product designed to keep critters out.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A new plant-based seafood; an intelligent chamber that grows mushrooms; unconventional men's swimwear; convertible clothing designed to fit one's lifestyle.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A portable athlete recovery device; an automated tattoo machine; eco-friendly buckwheat milk; compression hockey gear; guest shark Rashaun Williams.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A vest with a twist that was inspired by a girl's science project; baking healthy, homemade cookies; a cleaning solution for water bottles; re-usable fabric stickers.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A new plant-based seafood; an intelligent chamber that grows mushrooms; unconventional men's swimwear; convertible clothing designed to fit one's lifestyle.
